lines.english: God killed the five tigers.
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, the fear of reincarnation is gone. ||1||
He has driven out the ten wolves.
The three whirl-pools have stopped spinning.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਰਾਖਿਓ ਦਾਸੁ ਅਪਨਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਦਾ ਸਾਚਾ ਬਖਸਿੰਦ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: kar kirapaa raakhio daas apanaa sadaa sadaa saachaa bakhasind |1| rahaau |
lines.english: In His Mercy, He protects His slave; the True Lord is forever and ever the forgiver. ||1||Pause||
Meditating, meditating in remembrance on the Lord of the Universe, I live.
The mountain of sin is burnt down, like straw,
God, the embodiment of bliss, becomes manifest everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਪਿ ਜਪਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪੂਜੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਪੈਰ ॥
lines.translit: jap jap naam pooje prabh pair |
lines.english: by chanting and meditating on the Name, and worshipping God's feet.
I have crossed over the world-ocean, as if it were no bigger than a calf's footprint on the ground.

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਓ ਨਹ ਫੁਨਿ ਰੋਜ ॥
lines.translit: khed na paaeo neh fun roj |
lines.english: I shall never again have to endure suffering or grief.
Linked to His loving devotional worship, I enjoy peace. ||2||
When I am separated from Him, then I am consigned to the nether regions.
The ocean is contained in the pitcher.
This is not such an amazing thing for the Creator to do. ||3||
With love and affection, Nanak sings His Glorious Praises. ||4||40||51||
Vice and virtue are not under my control.
When He lifts me up and pulls me out, then I am enraptured by His Glance of Grace.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Attached to Maya, you are entangled in fraud.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਨੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਨਾ ਮਨੁ ਤੋਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: naa tan teraa naa man tohi |
lines.english: Neither your body nor your mind belong to you.
Seek the Sanctuary of the Lord's lotus feet, O my mind.
You play like a baby lamb.
But suddenly, Death will catch you in its noose. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਪਿ ਸੰਗਿ ਸਹਾਈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪਾਵਹਿ ਸਾਚੁ ਧਨਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: raam naam jap sang sahaaee guramukh paaveh saach dhanaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Chant the Name of the Lord, which will be your help and support. As Gurmukh, you shall obtain the true wealth. ||1||Pause||
Your unfinished worldly affairs will never be resolved.
You act in corruption in order to survive,
but not even an iota will go along with you, you ignorant fool! ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਮਦਿ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਝੂਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh mad sad hee jhoore |
lines.english: You shall always regret your sexual desire, anger and pride.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਉਡੀ ਕਉਡੀ ਕਉ ਖਾਕੁ ਸਿਰਿ ਛਾਨੈ ॥
lines.translit: kauddee kauddee kau khaak sir chhaanai |
lines.english: for the sake of mere shells, you throw dust upon your head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਦੀਆ ਤਿਸੈ ਨ ਚੇਤੈ ਮੂਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jin deea tisai na chetai mool |
lines.english: You never even think of the One who gave you life.
You practice deception, and you know many tricks;
The pain of false greed never leaves you. ||3||
With His lotus hands, He has attached us to the hem of His robe.
When the Supreme Lord God becomes merciful,
this mind becomes the dust of the feet of the Holy.
I seek the Sanctuary of the Sovereign Lord.
Raamkalee, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak merges in the Truest of the True. ||4||41||52||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਰਭਉ ਭਏ ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਗੁਨ ਗਾਵਤ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਦੁਖੁ ਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: nirbhau bhe gobind gun gaavat saadhasang dukh jaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have become fearless, singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe. In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, my pains have been taken away. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਰਾਮੁ ਬਸੈ ਮਨ ਮਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai raam basai man maahee |
lines.english: That person, within whose mind the Lord abides,
does not see the impassible world-ocean.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਰਸਨ ਨਿਤ ਜਪਨੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har har naam rasan nit japane |1|
lines.english: by chanting continually the Name of the Lord, Har, Har. ||1||
All one's affairs are resolved,
The Guru places His hand upon my forehead.
The fear of birth and death is dispelled;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੈ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਹਾਥੁ ਗੁਰੁ ਧਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis kai masatak haath gur dharai |
lines.english: Why should His slave feel any anxiety?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਦਰਸਨੁ ਪਾਏ ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਦਇਆਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: so darasan paae jis hoe deaal |
lines.english: He alone obtains the Blessed Vision of the Lord's Darshan, who is blessed by His Mercy.
I am enraptured, meeting with the Guru, the Transcendent Lord.
I am a sacrifice to the Perfect Guru. ||2||
Drink in the Ambrosial Nectar, O Beloved Holy people.
Your face shall be radiant and bright in the Court of the Lord.
crosses over the terrifying world-ocean in the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy. ||3||
One who is blessed by the Grace of the Supreme Lord God,
Celebrate and be blissful, and abandon all corruption.
O Nanak, meditate on the Lord and cross over. ||4||42||53||
